title: ASR Outdoor 8.25 Inch Rescue Knife with Belt Clip Seat Belt Cutter - Black
description:
Don't get caught in an emergency without the ASR Outdoor Rescue Knife. This knife features an overall length of 8.25" unfolded, and the serrated blade is about 3.5" in length. The knife itself has a belt clip on the black-colored handle. It can easily be opened with the simple push of your thumb. This emergency knife also comes with a seat belt cutter and window punch in case of an auto emergency. Make sure to keep one of these in your pocket, backpack, bug-out bag, or vehicle in case of an emergency!

ASR Outdoor 8.25 Inch Rescue Knife with Belt Clip Seat Belt Cutter - Black

Don't get caught in an emergency without the ASR Outdoor Rescue Knife.

Key Features

  • SERRATED FOLDING KNIFE - The ASR Outdoor folding pocket knife features a serrated blade, making it the ideal tool for cutting through belts and ropes, fabric and various other textured materials.
  • WINDOW PUNCH AND SEATBELT CUTTER - This emergency pocket knife comes with 2 emergency devices that will help get you out of a bad situation in the event of an auto emergency - a seat belt cutter and window punch.
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - The pocket knife is made of durable 3CR13 stainless steel that wont rust, so you can count on it rain or shine.
  • POCKET CLIP - The knife also comes with a steel pocket clip so you can easily keep it stored in your pocket to keep the blade safe when not in use.
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Overall length: 8.25" unfolded; Folded length: 4.75"; Blade length: 3.25"; Color: black; Material: 3CR13 stainless steel; Thumb assist open

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROORKBLK
  • UPC: 810058487513
  • Color: Black
